description: Set up environment: create feature branch from master, install dependencies, verify existing tests pass, and run golangci-lint to confirm baseline is green.
steps: Run 'go mod download' to ensure all dependencies are cached
Run 'go build ./...' to verify compilation succeeds
Run 'go test ./...' to verify all existing tests pass
Run 'golangci-lint run ./...' to verify no existing lint issues
acceptance_criteria: Feature branch 'feat/port-init-scripts' exists and is checked out
go test ./... exits 0 with all tests passing
golangci-lint run ./... exits 0 with no issues
findings: All checks passed clean. go build, go test, and golangci-lint all exit 0 with no issues. Go 1.25.1 used. golangci-lint 2.1.6 used. Tests run in ~0.1s total. 16 packages tested, all pass.
